data.body: AC amendment: Also remove the evals/ scan directory from check-model-id-lint.sh. Line 81 currently scans '$_root/evals' alongside '$_root/plugins/dso'. After the evals/ directory is deleted, this line should be updated to remove the '$_root/evals' scan target (or the entire for loop if evals/ is the only non-plugin scan target). Verify: ! grep -q '"\/evals"' plugins/dso/scripts/check-model-id-lint.sh
